__NOINDEX__
{{CargoRelicResonance
|relics=Bronze Shiva Statue,King's Gayageum,Sistine Madonna,Creation of Adam,Aladdin's Carpet
|rank=orange
|amount=5
|category=self
|description=Per 3 Orange Relics gained, Snail ATK +40<br>Orange Relics: 60/60
}}
[[Category:Self]]
[[Category:ATK Boost]]
[[Category:Enhanced by Orange Relics]]
